title: Malicious KICS Docker Images and VS Code Extensions Hit Checkmarx Supply Chain
summary: Cybersecurity researchers have warned of malicious images pushed to the official "checkmarx/kics" Docker Hub repository.
card_summary: Cybersecurity researchers have warned of malicious images pushed to the official "checkmarx/kics" Docker Hub repository.

sections.impact:
In an alert published today, software supply chain security company Socket revealed that unknown threat actors managed to have overwritten existing tags, including v2.1.20 and alpine, while also introducing a new v2.1.21 tag that does not correspond to an official release.

Assessed severity: MEDIUM.

email_summary: Cybersecurity researchers have warned of malicious images pushed to the official "checkmarx/kics" Docker Hub repository. In an alert published today, software supply chain security company Socket revealed that unknown threat actors managed to have overwritten existing tags, including v2.1.20 and alpine, while also introducing a new v2.1.21 tag that does not correspond to an official release.

title: Self-Propagating Supply Chain Worm Hijacks npm Packages to Steal Developer Tokens
summary: Cybersecurity researchers have flagged a fresh set of packages that have been compromised by bad actors to deliver a self-propagating worm that spreads through stolen developer npm tokens.
card_summary: Cybersecurity researchers have flagged a fresh set of packages that have been compromised by bad actors to deliver a self-propagating worm that spreads through stolen developer npm tokens.

sections.mitigation: The supply chain worm has been detected by both Socket and StepSecurity, with the companies tracking the activity under the name CanisterSprawl owing to the use of an ICP canister to exfiltrate the stolen data
sections.context: This fits the broader data-exposure trend where follow-on abuse of leaked information is common.

email_summary: Cybersecurity researchers have flagged a fresh set of packages that have been compromised by bad actors to deliver a self-propagating worm that spreads through stolen developer npm tokens. The supply chain worm has been detected by both Socket and StepSecurity, with the companies tracking the activity under the name CanisterSprawl owing to the use of an ICP canister to exfiltrate the stolen data.

title: Lotus Wiper Malware Targets Venezuelan Energy Systems in Destructive Attack
summary: Cybersecurity researchers have discovered a previously undocumented data wiper that has been used in attacks targeting Venezuela at the end of last year and the start of 2026.
card_summary: Cybersecurity researchers have discovered a previously undocumented data wiper that has been used in attacks targeting Venezuela at the end of last year and the start of 2026.
email_summary:
Cybersecurity researchers have discovered a previously undocumented data wiper that has been used in attacks targeting Venezuela at the end of last year and the start of 2026. Dubbed Lotus Wiper, the novel file wiper has been used in a destructive campaign targeting the energy and utilities sector in Venezuela, per findings from Kaspersky.

title: Toxic Combinations: When Cross-App Permissions Stack into Risk
summary: On January 31, 2026, researchers disclosed that Moltbook, a social network built for AI agents, had left its database wide open, exposing 35,000 email addresses and 1.5 million agent API tokens across 770,000 active agents.
card_summary: On January 31, 2026, researchers disclosed that Moltbook, a social network built for AI agents, had left its database wide open, exposing 35,000 email addresses and 1.5 million agent API tokens across 770,000 active agents.

email_summary: On January 31, 2026, researchers disclosed that Moltbook, a social network built for AI agents, had left its database wide open, exposing 35,000 email addresses and 1.5 million agent API tokens across 770,000 active agents. The more worrying part sat inside the private messages.

title: Cohere AI Terrarium Sandbox Flaw Enables Root Code Execution, Container Escape

card_summary: A critical security vulnerability has been disclosed in a Python-based sandbox called Terrarium that could result in arbitrary code execution.

sections.technical:
The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-5752, is rated 9.3 on the CVSS scoring system.
"Sandbox escape vulnerability in Terrarium allows arbitrary code execution with root privileges on a host process via JavaScript prototype chain traversal," according to A critical security vulnerability has been disclosed in a Python-based sandbox called Terrarium that could result in arbitrary code execution.

title: CISA Adds One Known Exploited Vulnerability to Catalog
summary: CISA has added one new vulnerability to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) Catalog , based on evidence of active exploitation.
card_summary: CISA has added one new vulnerability to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) Catalog , based on evidence of active exploitation.

sections.impact:
CVE-2026-33825 Microsoft Defender Insufficient Granularity of Access Control Vulnerability

 
 This type of vulnerability is a frequent attack vector for malicious cyber actors and poses significant risks to the federal enterprise. Binding Operational Directive (BOD) 22-01: Reducing the Significant Risk of Known Exploited Vulnerabilities established the KEV Catalog as a living list of known Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures (CVEs) that carry significant risk to the federal enterprise. Although BOD 22-01 only applies to FCEB agencies, CISA strongly urges all organizations to reduce their exposure to cyberattacks by prioritizing timely remediation of KEV Catalog vulnerabilities as part of their vulnerability management practice.

Assessed severity: CRITICAL.
sections.mitigation: BOD 22-01 requires Federal Civilian Executive Branch (FCEB) agencies to remediate identified vulnerabilities by the due date to protect FCEB networks against active threats.

email_summary: CISA has added one new vulnerability to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) Catalog , based on evidence of active exploitation. Tracked as CVE-2026-33825. Severity is rated critical.
